description: Comprehensive visualization: nearest characterized homologs and GO term assessment
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(18, 9))

# Panel 1: Distance dendrogram / bar chart showing nearest characterized neighbors
ax1 = axes[0]

proteins = [
    ('S. typhimurium\nAhpC (P0A251)', 69.0, 'AhpF-dependent', '#e74c3c'),
    ('E. coli\nAhpC (P0AE08)', 67.9, 'AhpF-dependent', '#e74c3c'),
    ('Human\nPRDX2 (P32119)', 47.6, 'Trx-dependent', '#3498db'),
    ('P. putida\ntsaA (Q88NW9)', 47.3, 'Trx-dependent', '#3498db'),
    ('S. cerevisiae\nTSA1 (P35704)', 46.5, 'Trx-dependent', '#3498db'),
    ('H. pylori\nAhpC (P56876)', 42.9, 'Trx-dependent', '#3498db'),
    ('M. tuberculosis\nAhpC (P9WQB7)', 38.3, 'AhpD-dependent', '#f39c12'),
]

names = [p[0] for p in proteins]
identities = [p[1] for p in proteins]
colors = [p[3] for p in proteins]

y_pos = np.arange(len(proteins))
bars = ax1.barh(y_pos, identities, color=colors, alpha=0.85, height=0.65, edgecolor='white')

# Add value labels
for i, (bar, val) in enumerate(zip(bars, identities)):
    ax1.text(val + 0.5, i, f'{val:.1f}%', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

ax1.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax1.set_yticklabels(names, fontsize=9)
ax1.set_xlabel('Sequence Identity to Q88K52 (%)', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('Nearest Characterized Homologs\nof P. putida AhpC (Q88K52)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_xlim(0, 80)
ax1.invert_yaxis()

# Add a dividing line between AhpF-dependent and others
ax1.axhline(y=1.5, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
ax1.text(75, 0.5, 'AhpF\nclade', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='#e74c3c', fontweight='bold',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#fadbd8', alpha=0.8))
ax1.text(75, 4.0, 'Trx/other\nclades', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='#3498db', fontweight='bold',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#d6eaf8', alpha=0.8))

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#e74c3c', alpha=0.85, label='AhpF-dependent'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#3498db', alpha=0.85, label='Trx-dependent'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#f39c12', alpha=0.85, label='AhpD-dependent'),
]
ax1.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=9)

# Panel 2: GO term hierarchy and evidence summary
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax2.axis('off')

ax2.text(5, 9.6, 'Evidence Summary & GO Assessment', ha='center', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

# GO hierarchy with arrows
hierarchy = [
    (0.5, 8.6, 'GO:0051920', 'peroxiredoxin activity', '#27ae60', '✓ Most precise'),
    (1.2, 7.8, 'GO:0140824', 'Trx-dependent Prx activity', '#f39c12', '△ Trx not demonstrated'),
    (1.9, 7.0, 'GO:0008379', 'thioredoxin peroxidase activity\n(SEED TERM)', '#e67e22', '△ Supported*'),
]

for x, y, go_id, name, color, verdict in hierarchy:
    ax2.text(x, y, f'→ {go_id}: {name}', fontsize=9, color='#2c3e50', fontweight='bold')
    ax2.text(8.5, y, verdict, fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold', color=color,
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor=color+'15', edgecolor=color, linewidth=1.5))

# Sibling term
ax2.text(0.5, 6.2, '↗ GO:0102039: NADH-dependent Prx activity (sibling)', fontsize=9, color='#2980b9', fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(8.5, 6.2, '✓ Also applies', fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold', color='#27ae60',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor='#d5f5e315', edgecolor='#27ae60', linewidth=1.5))

# Key evidence items
ax2.text(0.3, 5.2, 'Key Evidence:', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50')

evidence_items = [
    ('✓', 'Active site: 5/5 catalytic residues conserved (C47, C166, T44, E50, R120)', '#27ae60'),
    ('✓', 'Nearest characterized homolog: S. typhimurium AhpC (69% id, AhpF-dep)', '#27ae60'),
    ('✓', 'Domain architecture: AhpC-TSA + 1-CysPrx_C (cd03015 PRX_Typ2cys)', '#27ae60'),
    ('✓', 'Expressed under oxidative stress in P. putida (PMID:17107553)', '#27ae60'),
    ('△', 'PANTHER SF121 = "ALKYL HYDROPEROXIDE REDUCTASE C" (not Trx-dep)', '#f39c12'),
    ('△', 'P. putida has AhpF (P0A155) as dedicated reductant', '#f39c12'),
    ('△', 'Separate Trx-dependent Prx (tsaA/Q88NW9) in same organism', '#f39c12'),
    ('△', 'GO:0008379 has 0 experimental annotations across all organisms', '#f39c12'),
    ('✓', 'T. pallidum AhpC-like Prx uses Trx when AhpF absent (PMID:20304799)', '#3498db'),
]

for i, (symbol, text, color) in enumerate(evidence_items):
    y = 4.6 - i * 0.45
    ax2.text(0.5, y, symbol, fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color=color)
    ax2.text(1.0, y, text, fontsize=7.8, color='#2c3e50')

# Verdict box
ax2.text(5, 0.6, 'VERDICT: SUPPORTED (mild granularity caveat, failure mode #1)', 
         ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#27ae60',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='#d5f5e3', edgecolor='#27ae60', linewidth=2))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('comprehensive_assessment.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: comprehensive_assessment.png")
